# Snow Crab Fishing Area Comparison (Norwegian Vessels)

This project analyzes and compares fishing areas for **snow crab** across all Norwegian vessels recorded in the ERS logs.  

The comparison covers:
- **Catches from 2021–2024**
- **Catches from 2025** (no downsampling applied)

---

## Data Sources

All data originates from the ERS records for the included years.  
For efficiency, only crab fisheries were extracted and stored in filtered files.

- **Filtered catch data (2020–2025):**  
  [`data/crab_fisheries_2020-2025.csv`](data/crab_fisheries_2020-2025.csv)  
  *Generated by:* [`load_snowcrab_from_ers.py`](load_snowcrab_from_ers.py)

- **Vessel information (per year, with radio call sign & length):**  
  [`data/crab_fishing_vessels_nor.xlsx`](data/crab_fishing_vessels_nor.xlsx)  
  *Generated by:* [`analyze_and_plot.py`](analyze_and_plot.py)

- **Geofence areas (km²):**  
  [`data/geofence_areas.xlsx`](data/geofence_areas.xlsx)

---

## Plotting

The final plot and geofence area calculations were produced using:  
[`full_script_read_and_plot_final.py`](full_script_read_and_plot_final.py)

It includes:
- Multiple background tile sets  
- EEZ geofences  
- Different area representations:
  - Convex  
  - Concave  
  - Concave with buffer  
  - Points
  - Calculation of area in km²

---
